articles.title: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say

articles.title: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks but few deals confirmed

articles.title: Switzerland to open secret files on Auschwitz 'Angel of Death' Mengele

articles.title: Man killed by 13ft great white shark in Western Australia

articles.title: Judge declares another mistrial in Harvey Weinstein New York rape case

articles.title: US: New York's Long Island railway workers go on strike
articles.description: Nearly 300,000 passengers rely on the LIRR daily to travel between New York City, its boroughs and suburban Long Island.

articles.title: Taiwan urges Trump to advance arms deal after China summit

articles.title: China, US, Israel compete in fast-growing laser weapons race
articles.description: More Gulf states are turning to laser weapons to combat drones in the Iran war. Israel even loaned the UAE theirs. But do they actually work?
articles.titleJa: 中国、米国、イスラエルが急速に拡大するレーザー兵器開発競争で競合
articles.summary: 中国、米国、イスラエルがレーザー兵器開発競争を展開。湾岸諸国もイラン紛争でのドローン対策として導入を検討中。

articles.title: Germany news: Nearly half the country wants governing conservative coalition out
articles.description: A survey has shown that just 30% of people in Germany want the coalition government to continue. Meanwhile, pro-Palestinian demonstrators are to hold a march in Berlin to mark Nakba Day. DW has more.

articles.title: Andreas Rettig: 'You can't separate sports and politics'

articles.title: Australia: Man dies after shark attack off holiday island
articles.description: A 38-year-old man has died after being bitten by a shark in waters off Rottnest Island in Western Australia. It is the second shark death this year amid a rise in attacks.

articles.title: India news: PM Modi visits the Netherlands at start of Europe tour
articles.description: Modi is looking to deepen India's trade agreements with its European partners and diversify beyond China-centric supply chains. Meanwhile, Indian farmers are once again clashing with the police. Follow DW.

articles.title: Trump says IS second in command killed in Nigeria

articles.title: US stops Poland troop deployment after Germany pullout order
articles.description: Both Democratic and Republican lawmakers in the US have criticized the Trump administration's plans to cancel a troop deployment to Poland. It came after Trump ordered the pullout of 5,000 troops from Germany.
articles.titleJa: 米国、ドイツからの撤退命令後、ポーランドへの部隊展開を中止
articles.summary: 米国がドイツからの5000人規模の部隊撤退命令後、ポーランドへの部隊展開を中止。米国内で与野党双方から批判の声が上がっている。

articles.title: Middle East: Israel, Lebanon agree to extend truce, US says
articles.description: The US says Israeli and Lebanese delegations have agreed to extend a ceasefire for 45 days. The truce has reduced the volume of fighting, but violations are commonplace, particularly in southern Lebanon.
articles.titleJa: 中東：イスラエルとレバノンが停戦延長に合意、米国が発表
articles.summary: 米国によると、イスラエルとレバノンの代表団が45日間の停戦延長に合意。戦闘は減少したが、レバノン南部での違反は頻繁に発生。

articles.title: Trump says Islamic State ‘second in command’ killed by US and Nigerian forces
articles.description:
US president calls Abu-Bilal al-Minuki ‘most active terrorist in the world’ and says he was eliminated in ‘very complex mission’
Donald Trump has said US and Nigerian forces killed the “second in command” global leader of the Islamic State.
“Tonight, at my direction, brave American forces and the Armed Forces of Nigeria flawlessly executed a meticulously planned and very complex mission to eliminate the most active terrorist in the world from the battlefield,” the US president said on his Truth Social platform on Friday.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏、イスラム国の「No.2」が米・ナイジェリア軍によって殺害されたと発表
articles.summary: トランプ米大統領は、イスラム国の「No.2」が米軍とナイジェリア軍の共同作戦で殺害されたと発表した。これは「非常に複雑な任務」だったという。

articles.title: Ebola outbreak kills 65 people in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo
articles.description:
Uganda also reports outbreak and health officials say cases were caused by Bundibugyo strain of virus
An outbreak of Ebola has killed 65 people in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, health officials said.
There have been 246 suspected cases of the haemorrhagic fever reported so far in the conflict-hit Ituri province, which shares borders with Uganda and South Sudan.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 東部コンゴ民主共和国でエボラ出血熱が65人の命を奪う
articles.summary: コンゴ民主共和国東部でエボラ出血熱が大流行し、これまでに65人が死亡した。ウガンダ国境に近いイトゥリ州では246人の感染が疑われている。

articles.title: Mali’s forces target rebel alliance in junta’s fight to keep power
articles.description:
Army supported by Russian mercenaries launches airstrikes after offensive by coalition of Islamist extremists and Tuareg separatists
Mali’s armed forces, supported by Russian mercenaries, have launched airstrikes targeting a rebel alliance of Islamist extremists and Tuareg separatists as the ruling junta struggles to maintain its hold on power in the unstable west African country.
Earlier this week warplanes targeted the key northern town of Kidal, which was lost when the rebels launched a surprise offensive across much of Mali in late April.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: マリ軍、政権維持のため反乱同盟を標的とする
articles.summary: マリの軍隊はロシア人傭兵の支援を受け、イスラム過激派とトゥアレグ分離主義者の反乱同盟に空爆を開始。暫定政権が権力維持に苦戦している。

articles.title: Judge orders Trump administration to return Colombian woman deported to DRC back to the US
articles.description:
Judge called Adriana Maria Quiroz Zapata’s deportation to the Democratic Republic of Congo ‘likely illegal’
A federal judge has ordered the Trump administration to bring a Colombian woman back to the US from the Democratic Republic of Congo, after she was deported to the African country that had refused to accept her.
The deportation of Adriana María Quiroz Zapata “was likely illegal”, the US district judge Richard Leon ruled on Wednesday.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 裁判官、トランプ政権にコンゴ民主共和国へ強制送還されたコロンビア人女性を米国へ送還するよう命令
articles.summary: 米連邦裁判官は、トランプ政権に対し、コンゴ民主共和国へ強制送還されたコロンビア人女性を米国に戻すよう命じた。この強制送還は「違法の可能性が高い」と判断された。

articles.title: UN pleads for Equatorial Guinea not to send US asylum seekers to their home countries: ‘Their life would be in danger’
articles.description:
Human rights experts make rare public appeal as US deportees describe being held in ‘prison-like’ conditions
Human rights experts at the United Nations issued a rare public appeal to Equatorial Guinea, urging the central African country to halt its plans to return US deportees to their home countries, where they face political violence, torture and death.
The statement, co-signed by a representative of the African Commission on Human and People’s Rights, adds diplomatic pressure on Equatorial Guinea, one of the world’s most repressive regimes, to comply with international human rights standards and avoid refoulement, or the expulsion of people to countries where they face persecution.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 国連、赤道ギニアに米国からの亡命希望者を本国へ送還しないよう懇願：「彼らの命が危険に晒される」
articles.summary: 国連の専門家は、赤道ギニアに対し、米国からの強制送還者を本国に送還しないよう緊急に要請。送還すれば彼らの命が危険に晒されると警告した。

articles.title: Threatened indictment of Raúl Castro ratchets up US pressure on Cuba
articles.description:
Trump administration move echoes indictment of Venezuela’s Nicolás Maduro as fuel crisis racks Cuba
Tensions between Cuba and US seem set to rise further amid reports that 

 Raúl Castro, the country’s 94-year-old former president, may soon face the type of indictment that led to the US abduction of the Venezuelan leader, Nicolás Maduro, in January.
Although Raúl is officially retired, he remains the most potent figure in Cuban politics following the death of his brother Fidel in 2016, and by targeting him Washington appears to be heaping pressure on Cuba’s communist leadership at the end of an already extraordinarily intense week.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ラウル・カストロ氏への起訴脅威が米国によるキューバへの圧力を強化
articles.summary: トランプ政権によるラウル・カストロ前キューバ国家評議会議長への起訴の可能性が報じられ、米国とキューバ間の緊張がさらに高まっている。

articles.title: Weather tracker: Furnace Creek sizzles as snow sweeps Siberia in a week of extremes
articles.description:
Record heat in North and Central America coincides with egg-sized hailstones in eastern China
Extreme weather across several parts of the world this week has brought record-breaking temperatures to Honduras, North America and Indonesia.
Honduras smashed its all-time May maximum temperature record earlier this month – only for it to be broken again on 13 May in Choluteca, known as the furnace of Central America. Temperatures climbed to 42.2C (107.9F), surpassing the previous record of 42.1C. With intense heat forecast to persist over the coming weeks, more records are expected to fall.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 気象追跡：極端な一週間、ファーネスクリークは灼熱、シベリアは雪
articles.summary: 今週、世界各地で極端な気象現象が発生。ホンジュラスや北中米、インドネシアでは記録的な暑さが観測され、シベリアでは雪、中国東部では雹が降った。

articles.title: 13 men killed by US military boat strikes identified: ‘These were flesh-and-blood people’
articles.description:
All victims of US strikes in eastern Pacific and the Caribbean identified so far came from extremely poor communities

Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email

A five-month investigation has named 13 previously unidentified victims of US attacks on boats allegedly carrying narcotics in a campaign that has killed nearly 200 people in the Caribbean and the eastern Pacific.
It is unclear if the US has ever identified any of its 194 victims before attacking them, and the names of just three had previously emerged, after their families launched legal cases against the White House.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 米軍のボート攻撃で死亡した13人の身元が判明：「彼らは生身の人間だった」
articles.summary: 米軍がカリブ海と東太平洋で麻薬密輸船とされるボートを攻撃し、約200人が死亡した作戦の犠牲者13人の身元が判明した。

articles.title: CIA director has met officials in Havana for talks, Cuba claims
articles.description:
Visit comes after US-Cuba relations deteriorated significantly, and as the island nation declared it had ‘absolutely no fuel’ because of US blockade
CIA director John Ratcliffe met Cuban officials in Havana on Thursday as a way to improve dialogue between the US and the communist-run island, the Cuban government said.
The meeting took place “in a context marked by the complexity of bilateral relations, with the aim of contributing to the political dialogue between both nations”, a statement said.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: CIA長官がハバナで当局者と会談したとキューバが主張
articles.summary: キューバ政府は、CIA長官がハバナでキューバ当局者と会談したと発表した。これは米・キューバ関係改善に向けた対話の一環と見られる。

articles.title: Canada is welcome to join Eurovision, says song contest director
articles.description:
‘We know that Mark Carney wants to sort of embrace Europe,’ says competition director Martin Green
Canada is welcome to join Eurovision if it wishes, its director has said, months after the country revealed it wanted to “explore” joining the song contest in its federal budget.
Eurovision director Martin Green told the BBC on Wednesday that Canada hadn’t yet applied, but would be welcome to.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ユーロビジョン歌謡祭のディレクター、カナダの参加を歓迎すると表明
articles.summary: ユーロビジョン歌謡祭のディレクターは、カナダが参加を希望するなら歓迎すると表明した。カナダは以前から同歌謡祭への参加を検討していた。

articles.title: Malta offers free ChatGPT Plus access to its citizens through a national AI program
articles.description: Citizens and residents registered with Malta’s online identity system can apply to get access to ChatGPT Plus after completing a free online course.
articles.titleJa: マルタ、国家AIプログラムを通じて国民にChatGPT Plusの無料アクセスを提供
articles.summary: マルタ政府は、オンライン身分証明システムに登録された国民および居住者に対し、無料のオンラインコース修了後にChatGPT Plusへのアクセスを提供する国家AIプログラムを開始した。

articles.title: Cannes confidential: White Lotus fans await shooting of new season in French resort
articles.description: While filming has already begun along the French Riviera, The White Lotus' production team has yet to be seen in Cannes, making the likelihood of the iconic film festival being used as backdrop increasingly uncertain.
articles.titleJa: カンヌ極秘情報：「ホワイト・ロータス」新シーズン撮影をファンが待望
articles.summary: ドラマ「ホワイト・ロータス」の新シーズン撮影がフレンチ・リビエラで開始されたが、カンヌでの撮影が未確認であり、象徴的な映画祭が背景に使われる可能性は不確実となっている。

articles.title: Putin to visit China days after Trump's Beijing trip, Kremlin says
articles.description: Putin and Chinese President Xi Jinping will discuss ways to deepen their countries' "comprehensive partnership and strategic cooperation," the Kremlin said.
articles.titleJa: クレムリン発表：トランプ氏の北京訪問後、プーチン大統領が中国を訪問へ
articles.summary: クレムリンは、プーチン大統領がトランプ氏の北京訪問数日後に中国を訪問し、習近平国家主席と両国の「包括的パートナーシップと戦略的協力」を深化させる方法を協議すると発表した。

articles.title: Latest news bulletin | May 16th, 2026 – Midday
articles.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this May 16th, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.
articles.titleJa: 最新ニュース速報 | 2026年5月16日 – 正午
articles.summary: 2026年5月16日正午時点のヨーロッパ内外の最重要ニュース、速報、世界情勢、ビジネス、エンターテイメント、政治、文化、旅行の最新情報をまとめてお届けする。

articles.title: Council of Europe reinterprets migrant rights, Meloni champions 'Italian model'
articles.description: Council of Europe member states have backed a declaration reinterpreting the European Convention on Human Rights, and Italy claims credit for the returns scheme agreed by Rome and Tirana.

articles.summary: 欧州評議会の加盟国が欧州人権条約の再解釈を支持する宣言を採択し、イタリアはローマとティラナ間で合意された送還スキーム「イタリア・モデル」の成果を主張している。

articles.title: Baby dolls, whale songs and swimming in urine: The Venice Biennale’s must-see national pavilions
articles.description: The national pavilions that chime with Kouoh’s core values of nurture, intimacy and reflection are those that quietly steal this year’s spotlight.
articles.titleJa: 赤ん坊の人形、クジラの歌、尿で泳ぐ：ヴェネツィア・ビエンナーレの必見パビリオン

articles.title: Trump's independence warning prompts response from Taiwan
articles.description: Taiwan's foreign ministry said in a statement following Trump's comments that "Beijing has no right to claim jurisdiction over Taiwan."
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏の独立に関する警告に対し台湾が反応
articles.summary: トランプ氏の発言を受け、台湾外交部が「北京には台湾に対する管轄権を主張する権利はない」と声明を発表し、台湾の主権に関する国際的な論争が再燃している。

articles.title: Search continues for bodies of Italian divers who died in Maldives
articles.description: Five Italians died during the incident while reportedly "attempting to explore caves at a depth of 50 metres," the Italian Ministry of Foreign Affairs said earlier this week.
articles.titleJa: モルディブで死亡したイタリア人ダイバーの遺体捜索が続く
articles.summary: モルディブ沖で5人のイタリア人ダイバーが水深50メートルの洞窟探査中に死亡した事故を受け、イタリア外務省は遺体捜索が継続されていることを発表した。

articles.title: How to get Euronews displayed as your favourite news source on Google
articles.description: Google offers a new function for all those who want to stay up to date: From now on, you can specify which news provider should be emphasised in search queries. This way you can make Euronews your favourite source.

articles.title: Magnus the wandering walrus swaps Scotland for Norway
articles.description: The young male - who was named Magnus during his travels - is spotted again after crossing the North Sea.
articles.titleJa: 放浪セイウチ「マグナス」、スコットランドからノルウェーへ移動
articles.summary: 旅の途中で「マグナス」と名付けられた若いオスセイウチが、北海を渡った後、スコットランドからノルウェーで再び目撃された。

articles.title: EU needs to delay social media access for children - von der Leyen
articles.description: She told an EU summit that an expert panel was due to come up with steps on how to protect minors online by July.
articles.titleJa: EU、子どものソーシャルメディアアクセス制限を提唱 - フォン・デア・ライエン委員長
articles.summary: フォン・デア・ライエンEU委員長は、EUサミットで子どもたちのオンライン保護のため、ソーシャルメディアへのアクセスを遅らせる必要性を訴えた。

articles.title: Zelensky's ex-chief of staff in court as Ukraine corruption probe escalates
articles.description: Andriy Yermak was named by Ukraine's two anti-corruption agencies as a suspect in a money-laundering scheme.
articles.titleJa: ゼレンスキー元首席補佐官が法廷に、ウクライナの汚職捜査が激化
articles.summary: ウクライナの反汚職機関が、ゼレンスキー大統領の元首席補佐官アンドリー・イェルマク氏を資金洗浄疑惑の容疑者として指名し、汚職捜査が激化している。

articles.title: Why is Ireland not taking part in this year's Eurovision?
articles.description: Ireland's boycott is the latest in a series of moves that has seen the country at odds with Israel over its war in Gaza.
articles.titleJa: アイルランド、今年のユーロビジョンに参加しない理由とは？
articles.summary: アイルランドが今年のユーロビジョンをボイコットする理由は、ガザ戦争を巡るイスラエルとの対立による一連の動きの一環である。

articles.title: Mexico cancels plans to end school year early for World Cup
articles.description: Parents were angry at a proposal to end classes on 5 June instead of 15 July due to the tournament and expected extreme heat.
articles.titleJa: メキシコ、ワールドカップのために学期早期終了計画を撤回
articles.summary: メキシコは、ワールドカップと予想される猛暑のため、学期を7月15日から6月5日に早める提案に対し、保護者からの怒りを受け計画を撤回した。

articles.title: Trump ally Kari Lake tapped to be US ambassador to Jamaica
articles.description: Lake thanked President Trump for nominating her, saying on social media that Jamaica "is a country I know very well, full of incredible people".
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏の盟友カリ・レイク氏、駐ジャマイカ米大使に指名
articles.summary: トランプ大統領の盟友カリ・レイク氏が駐ジャマイカ米大使に指名された。レイク氏はジャマイカを「よく知る素晴らしい人々でいっぱいの国」と述べ、トランプ氏に感謝した。

articles.title: Tourist hotspot at 'end of the world' denies causing hantavirus outbreak
articles.description: The BBC reports from the city of Ushuaia, where experts have been sent to investigate the origins of the outbreak.
articles.titleJa: 「世界の果て」の観光地、ハンタウイルス発生の原因を否定
articles.summary: BBCは、ハンタウイルス発生源を調査するため専門家が派遣されたウシュアイア市から報道。同市は発生の原因であることを否定している。

articles.title: BBC tests out England and Argentina's World Cup training grounds in Kansas City
articles.description: Will Grant visited one of the pitches where England captain Harry Kane and his team will call home ahead of the tournament.
articles.titleJa: BBC、カンザスシティにあるイングランドとアルゼンチンのワールドカップ練習場を試用
articles.summary: ウィル・グラント記者が、ワールドカップを前にイングランド主将ハリー・ケイン率いるチームが拠点とするピッチの一つを訪れ、その様子を報じた。

articles.title: Advocaat, 78, set for World Cup record after Curacao return
articles.description: Dick Advocaat makes a surprise return as Curacao's head coach after his successor Fred Rutten resigned just a month out from their World Cup debut.

articles.title: Trump and Lula's private Oval Office meeting signals lingering strain - and effort to avoid tension
articles.description: The US and Brazilian presidents did not appear together publicly, but traded compliments after their talks.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏とルーラ氏の私的な大統領執務室会談、残る緊張と緊張回避の努力を示す
articles.summary: 米国のトランプ氏とブラジルのルーラ氏が私的な会談を行った。両大統領は公の場に一緒に姿を現さなかったが、会談後には互いに称賛の言葉を述べた。

articles.title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?
articles.description: Passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus are being repatriated, so what is the risk to the wider public?
articles.titleJa: ハンタウイルスについて、どの程度心配すべきか？
articles.summary: ハンタウイルスに感染した可能性のある乗客が本国に送還されているが、一般市民へのリスクはどの程度なのかが問われている。

articles.title: How are countries responding to hantavirus?
articles.description: The UK, US and EU are asking all citizens returning home from the virus-hit MV Hondius to self-isolate for about six weeks.
articles.titleJa: 各国はハンタウイルスにどう対応しているか？
articles.summary: 英国、米国、EUは、ウイルスが発生したMVホンディウス号から帰国するすべての国民に約6週間の自己隔離を求めている。

articles.title: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
articles.description: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.
articles.titleJa: 世界の森林減少は鈍化するも、エルニーニョ現象による火災が進行を脅かす可能性
articles.summary: 新たな分析によると、昨年の熱帯雨林の減少は緩和されたが、科学者らはエルニーニョ現象による火災が進行を脅かすと警告している。

articles.title: The other life of US soldier accused of betting on Maduro's removal
articles.description: The Army officer charged with using classified information to win $400,000 is also a real estate investor with rave reviews on Airbnb.
articles.titleJa: マドゥロ氏失脚に賭けた容疑の米兵のもう一つの顔
articles.summary: 機密情報を利用して40万ドルを獲得したとして起訴された陸軍将校は、Airbnbで高評価を得る不動産投資家という別の顔も持っていた。

articles.title: Who is defending Cuba’s threatened species?
articles.description: Cuba hosts some of the world’s richest biodiversity but faces the impacts of climate change, human activity and weak protections. Scientists and activists strive to preserve endangered wildlife and ecosystems.
articles.titleJa: キューバの絶滅危惧種を守っているのは誰か？
articles.summary: キューバの豊かな生物多様性が気候変動や人間活動により脅威にさらされており、科学者や活動家が絶滅危惧種の保護に努めている。

articles.title: Brazil opens investigation on Google over its AI’s impact on the journalism industry
articles.description: Commissioner Diogo Thomson considered that the insertion of generative AI has “significantly altered the dynamics of access, visibility, and monetization of journalistic content in the digital environment.”
articles.titleJa: ブラジル、GoogleのAIがジャーナリズム業界に与える影響について調査を開始
articles.summary: ブラジルが、生成AIの導入がジャーナリズムコンテンツのアクセス、可視性、収益化のダイナミクスを大きく変えたとして、Googleに対する調査を開始した。

articles.title: The human cost of the data center push in Latin America
articles.description: In this cross-border article, Global Voices is sharing stories from several countries in Latin America where communities are pushing back against AI-driven data center development.
articles.titleJa: ラテンアメリカでのデータセンター建設推進による人的コスト
articles.summary: ラテンアメリカの複数の国で、AI駆動のデータセンター開発に対し地域社会が反発しており、その人的コストが問題視されている。

articles.title: Brazil: A warning on how AI and deepfakes can become an ’excessive risk‘ to women and girls
articles.description: A technical note by research center Internetlab points out that advances in synthetic image creators increase the risks of gender violence online and talks about platforms’ accountability
articles.titleJa: ブラジル：AIとディープフェイクがいかに女性や少女にとって「過度なリスク」になりうるかという警告
articles.summary: ブラジルの研究機関が、AIやディープフェイク技術の進歩がオンラインでのジェンダー暴力のリスクを高め、プラットフォームの責任を問う警告を発した。

articles.title: AI hype narrative reaches the public healthcare system in El Salvador
articles.description: This time we take you to El Salvador, examining government claims that an AI-supported transformation of the public healthcare system will make it the most advanced in the world.
articles.titleJa: AI誇大宣伝がエルサルバドルの公衆衛生システムに到達
articles.summary: エルサルバドルで政府がAIによる公衆衛生システムの変革を主張しており、世界で最も先進的になるとするその真偽が検証されている。

articles.title: The technological transformation of Colombia's armed conflict
articles.description: More than simply a uniform adoption of artificial intelligence, a technological innovation has emerged that is transforming the battlefield, decision-making processes, local narratives, and forms of social control.
articles.titleJa: コロンビアの武力紛争における技術的変革
articles.summary: コロンビアの武力紛争において、AIを含む技術革新が戦場、意思決定、地域の物語、社会統制の形を変革している。

articles.title: When dry season never ends
articles.description: In an era marked by intense transnational mobility, the uneven distribution of rights and experiences in host communities reflects underlying dynamics of power and privilege that demand further scrutiny.
articles.titleJa: 乾季が終わらない時
articles.summary: 国境を越えた人の移動が活発な時代において、受け入れ側のコミュニティにおける権利と経験の不均衡は、権力と特権の根底にある力学を反映しており、さらなる検証が求められている。

articles.title: How AI is used to influence global elections
articles.description: Companies that work in political persuasion are experimenting with AI at scale to see how they can make the traditional influencing methods even cheaper, faster, more convincing, and more automated.
articles.titleJa: AIがいかにして世界の選挙に影響を与えるために使われているか
articles.summary: 政治的説得を行う企業が、AIを使って従来の選挙影響方法をより安価、迅速、説得力があり自動化されたものにするための実験を行っている。

articles.title: Community micro-hydropower plants revolutionise isolated areas of the Dominican Republic
articles.description: Community micro-hydropower projects in the DR rely on local leadership to deliver energy from renewable sources to isolated areas excluded from national distribution systems, contributing to reduced greenhouse gas emissions.
articles.titleJa: ドミニカ共和国の孤立地域を革新するコミュニティ小水力発電所
articles.summary: ドミニカ共和国の遠隔地で、地域主導の小水力発電プロジェクトが再生可能エネルギーを供給し、温室効果ガス削減に貢献している。

articles.title: How Bad Bunny brought the issue of Puerto Rico’s power grid into world view
articles.description: Puerto Rico’s electricity system has faced repeated crises since 2017’s Hurricane Maria, which destroyed much of the grid and triggered the longest blackout in modern U.S. history; outages remain routine.
articles.titleJa: バッド・バニーがいかにしてプエルトリコの電力網問題を世界に知らしめたか
articles.summary: プエルトリコの電力システムは、ハリケーン・マリア以来、繰り返し危機に直面しており、バッド・バニーがこの問題を世界に提起した。

articles.title: Xi takes Trump on tour of Communist Party's seat of power in Beijing
articles.description: Trump and Xi toured Zhongnanhai, the heavily guarded compound where China's top leaders live and work.
articles.titleJa: 習主席がトランプ氏を北京の共産党権力中枢施設へ案内
articles.summary: 中国の習主席がトランプ氏を北京の共産党最高指導部の居住・執務施設である中南海に案内。米中首脳間の重要な会談。

articles.title: Former China hawk elected Solomon Islands' leader
articles.description: Vote comes a week after lawmakers ousted the nation's former pro-China prime minister.
articles.titleJa: 親中派だったソロモン諸島の前首相を失脚させた後、反中派が新指導者に選出
articles.summary: ソロモン諸島で、親中派の前首相が失脚した1週間後に反中派の指導者が選出された。国家の政治方向を左右する重要な動き。

articles.title: New Zealand's Māori Queen meets King Charles at Buckingham Palace
articles.description: The meeting with the British monarch was Te Arikinui's first since she became Maori Queen in 2024.
articles.titleJa: ニュージーランドのマオリ族女王がバッキンガム宮殿でチャールズ国王と会見
articles.summary: ニュージーランドのマオリ族女王が2024年の即位後初めてバッキンガム宮殿でチャールズ国王と会談。歴史的かつ文化的な象徴的意義を持つ。

articles.title: Flattery and fanfare as Trump welcomed to China - but thorny issues remain
articles.description: The leaders of the world's two superpowers were all smiles for the cameras during the US president's visit to Beijing.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏が中国で歓迎されるも、依然として困難な問題が残る
articles.summary: 米中両国首脳は北京訪問中に笑顔を見せたが、両大国間には依然として解決すべき困難な問題が山積している。

articles.title: Gunfire chaos as Philippine senator resists ICC arrest: What we know so far
articles.description: Gunshots rang out sparking chaos in the Senate building where Senator Ronald "Bato" dela Rosa had sought refuge.
articles.titleJa: フィリピン上院議員がICC逮捕に抵抗し銃撃騒動、これまでの経緯
articles.summary: フィリピン上院議員が国際刑事裁判所の逮捕に抵抗し、上院議事堂で銃撃事件が発生し混乱を招いた。国内の政治的緊張が高まっている。

articles.title: Honda makes its first annual loss in 70 years
articles.description: The firm will now pivot away from scrapping its target for all of its vehicles to be electric by 2040.
articles.titleJa: ホンダが70年ぶりの年間赤字を計上
articles.summary: ホンダが70年ぶりに年間赤字を計上。同社は2040年までに全車両を電動化する目標の撤回を検討しない方針に転換する。

articles.title: Climbers clear path to Everest summit past giant chunk of ice
articles.description: Nearly 1,000 climbers will attempt to scale the peak in coming weeks and this has raised safety concerns.
articles.titleJa: 登山家たちが巨大な氷の塊を越えエベレスト山頂への道を切り開く
articles.summary: 登山家たちがエベレストの巨大な氷塊を越え、山頂への道を開拓。数百人もの登山者が登頂を試みる中、安全への懸念が高まっている。

articles.title: Alleged scammer extradited after  hacking attempt on BTS star Jungkook
articles.description: The suspect allegedly tried to transfer millions of dollars worth of shares from the K-pop singer's account.
articles.titleJa: BTSメンバー・ジョングクへのハッキング未遂容疑者が送還
articles.summary: K-POPスター、BTSのジョングクの口座から数百万ドル相当の株式を不正送金しようとした容疑者が送還された。

articles.title: Elon Musk and Jensen Huang among CEOs joining Trump on China trip
articles.description: More than a dozen US executives have joined the president on his visit, where he will meet his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping.
articles.titleJa: イーロン・マスクやジェンセン・ファンらCEOがトランプ氏の中国訪問に同行
articles.summary: トランプ大統領の中国訪問に、イーロン・マスクやジェンセン・ファンを含む10数名のアメリカ人企業幹部が同行。米中首脳会談を控え経済界も注目。

articles.title: Indigenous Australians win record A$150m after billionaire mined without permission
articles.description: The Yindjibarndi people had sought A$1.8bn compensation for cultural damage and economic loss.
articles.titleJa: オーストラリア先住民が億万長者の無許可採掘に対し過去最高の1億5000万豪ドルを獲得
articles.summary: オーストラリアの先住民族が、億万長者による無許可採掘に対する訴訟で文化損害と経済的損失の補償として1億5000万豪ドルを獲得。歴史的な勝訴となった。

articles.title: Members advance transparency work in rules of origin, explore trade facilitation links
articles.description: At a meeting of the Committee on Rules of Origin (CRO) on 11-12 May, WTO members advanced work on transparency and notification practices, discussed the future direction of work on preferential rules of origin for least-developed countries (LDCs), and participated in an information session on the links between trade facilitation and rules of origin. The meeting was chaired by Ms Carol Tsang of Hong Kong, China.
articles.titleJa: メンバーは原産地規則の透明性作業を進め、貿易円滑化の連携を模索
articles.summary: WTOの原産地規則委員会で、加盟国は透明性作業を進め、LDC向け特恵原産地規則の将来方向や貿易円滑化との関連を議論した。

articles.title: Sweden contributes SEK 2 million to WTO capacity-building activities
articles.description: Sweden has given SEK 2 million (just under CHF 170,000) to the WTO's Global Trust Fund for 2026 to finance technical assistance and training programmes for government officials from developing economies and least-developed countries (LDCs). The contribution was confirmed at a signing ceremony on 8 May at the WTO attended by Ambassador Nina Tornberg of Sweden and the WTO's Director of the Finance and Corporate Services Division, Andrew Rizk.
articles.titleJa: スウェーデン、WTOの能力構築活動に200万スウェーデン・クローナを拠出
articles.summary: スウェーデンは、WTOのグローバル信託基金に200万スウェーデン・クローナを拠出。開発途上国の政府職員向け技術支援・研修プログラムを支援する。

articles.title: General Council chair outlines next steps to build on momentum from MC14 negotiations
articles.description: At the first meeting of the General Council since the 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14), the newly elected Chairperson, Ambassador Clare Kelly (New Zealand), reported on her consultations with members on how to continue discussions in Geneva to build upon the high level of convergence on several areas of work at MC14 held in Yaoundé, Cameroon. Members also took note of Türkiye's announcement that it was joining the growing convergence to extend the e-commerce moratorium, with many welcoming the additional progress in narrowing gaps in the discussions.
articles.titleJa: 事務総長会議議長、MC14交渉の勢いを引き継ぐ次の一歩を概説
articles.summary: MC14後初の一般理事会で、議長は今後の交渉継続の次の一歩を提示。トルコが電子商取引モラトリアム延長に加わり、合意形成が進んだ。

articles.title: United States notifies import surcharges, ready for WTO consultations
articles.description: At a meeting of the Committee on Balance-of-Payments Restrictions held on 5 May, WTO members discussed the United States’ new notification regarding the imposition of import surcharges to address the country’s serious balance-of-payments deficits. The United States said the surcharges took effect on 24 February 2026 and will expire on 24 July 2026, unless extended by an act of Congress. Members welcomed the transparency of the United States and its readiness to engage in consultations in line with WTO rules.
articles.titleJa: 米国、輸入追加課税を通知しWTO協議の準備完了
articles.summary: 米国は、国際収支赤字対策として輸入追加課税の導入をWTOに通知。2026年2月に発効し、7月に失効予定で、WTO規則に基づく協議に意欲を示した。

articles.title: WTO members discuss action plan for cotton sector after MC14, World Cotton Day 2026
articles.description: WTO members reviewed global cotton market trends and the path ahead for the cotton sector at meetings in Geneva on 4 May. The meetings follow the high-level cotton event at the 14th WTO Ministerial Conference (MC14) in Cameroon in March. Delegations noted commitments announced at MC14 to invest in African countries moving up the cotton value chain and stressed the vital contribution of cotton to international trade and its potential to foster sustainable development.
articles.titleJa: WTO加盟国、MC14後と2026年世界綿花デー後に綿花部門の行動計画を議論
articles.summary: WTO加盟国は、MC14後に世界の綿花市場動向と綿花部門の行動計画を議論。アフリカ諸国への投資コミットメントが確認され、持続可能な開発への貢献を強調した。

articles.title: Trade Policy Review: Belize
articles.description: The fourth review of the trade policies and practices of Belize takes place on 4 and 6 May 2026. The basis for the review is a report by the WTO Secretariat and a report by the Government of Belize.
articles.titleJa: 貿易政策レビュー：ベリーズ
articles.summary: 2026年5月4日と6日に、ベリーズの貿易政策と慣行に関する第4回レビューが実施される。WTO事務局とベリーズ政府の報告書が基礎となる。

articles.title: Members adopt rules of procedure at first Fisheries Subsidies Committee meeting
articles.description: WTO members held the first regular meeting of the Committee on Fisheries Subsidies on 1 May 2026, marking a milestone in the implementation of the Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies. They approved various decisions on the functioning of the Committee.
articles.titleJa: メンバー、初の漁業補助金委員会で手続き規則を採択
articles.summary: WTO加盟国は2026年5月1日、初の漁業補助金委員会を開催。漁業補助金協定の実施における画期的な一歩を記し、委員会の運営規則を採択した。

articles.title: Transparency on subsidies remains central focus of SCM Committee
articles.description: At regular and special meetings of the Committee on Subsidies and Countervailing Measures (SCM) on 30 April 2026, improving transparency through the timely and complete submission of subsidy notifications was once again a central theme of the Committee’s work. The Chair, Jungsoo Hur of the Republic of Korea, emphasized the critical importance of transparency for the effective operation of the Committee and expressed concern about the continued low level of compliance with notification obligations. He strongly encouraged members to submit their outstanding notifications as soon as possible.
articles.titleJa: 補助金の透明性、SCM委員会の中核的焦点であり続ける
articles.summary: SCM委員会の会議では、補助金通知の適時かつ完全な提出を通じた透明性の向上が中心テーマ。議長は通知義務遵守率の低さに懸念を表明した。

articles.title: WTO opens online registration for 2026 Public Forum, launches call for proposals
articles.description: The WTO has opened online registration for this year’s Public Forum, titled Powering the Future, which will take place at the WTO premises in Geneva from 15 to 17 September. It has also launched a call for proposals for the event, which this year will focus on services trade.
articles.titleJa: WTO、2026年公開フォーラムのオンライン登録を開始、提案募集も開始
articles.summary: WTOは、9月15日から17日までジュネーブで開催される公開フォーラム「未来を動かす」のオンライン登録と、サービス貿易に焦点を当てた提案募集を開始した。

articles.title: Canada commits CAD 500,000 to strengthen food safety and plant and animal health capacity
articles.description: Canada is providing CAD 500,000 (approximately CHF 286,000) to the Standards and Trade Development Facility (STDF) to strengthen sanitary and phytosanitary (SPS) capacity of public and private sector stakeholders in developing and least-developed countries. The contribution will support STDF activities that help countries meet international food safety and plant and animal health standards and facilitate safe trade, based on the STDF Strategy for 2025-2030.
articles.titleJa: カナダ、食料安全保障と植物・動物衛生能力強化のため50万カナダドルを拠出
articles.summary: カナダは、開発途上国の食料安全保障と植物・動物衛生能力強化のため、STDFに50万カナダドルを拠出。国際基準を満たし安全な貿易を促進する活動を支援する。
